message:
feat(abi): add thread-safe textdomain/bindtextdomain state, setjmp host delegation, and isatty errno fix

locale_abi: Implements thread-safe storage for textdomain() and
bindtextdomain() using Mutex<OnceLock> with TextDomainState and
LocaleDirState structs. Rejects invalid locales in newlocale() even
when a base parameter is provided.

setjmp_abi: Adds host delegation for the full setjmp/longjmp family
(setjmp, _setjmp, sigsetjmp, longjmp, _longjmp, siglongjmp) with
documented fallback strategy.

unistd_abi: Fixes isatty() error handling to properly call
set_abi_errno() and return 0 on errors instead of propagating raw
error codes.

Includes comprehensive tests for state persistence, per-domain
tracking, invalid locale rejection, and isatty errno behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
